_purpose: Provenance anchor: the grader's floors+weights are FROZEN at this commit, BEFORE the 3 sequestered HOLDOUT pages are scored. This proves the grader was not tuned to fit the holdout (the out-of-sample generalization gate). Verify: git log shows this commit precedes any holdout-score commit.
protocol: 1) build clones for the holdout sources on LOCAL 8001; 2) compute the fused grader score per pair and SEAL to a withheld key (human never sees it); 3) human BLIND-scores source-vs-clone 0-100; 4) reveal + compare (ordinal + recall + band). If a holdout page fails capture (react.dev assets blocked here, posthog prior capture limit), substitute a buildable archetype-diverse page and note it. A FAIL is NOT re-tuned-and-reopened — return to synthetic + need a NEW holdout.
caveats: react.dev assets are blocked in this network (renders unstyled/too-tall = invalid source grade per memory reactdev_source_render_blocked); posthog hit a capture limit before. supabase is the proven north-star. Holdout may need 1-2 buildable substitutes.
